title: nnDMT CH Abort Dose Estimator
description: A harm reduction modeling tool that estimates bioavailable N,N-dimethyltryptamine (mg) from user-reported vaporization parameters for cluster headache abortive use. Covers 510-thread carts, pod systems (Vaporesso XROS, OXVA Xlim), e-rigs (Ispire Daab, Yocan Orbit, Puffco Peak Pro), direct e-mesh RDA (SS316L), sub-ohm tanks, and glass pipe. Designed to support community-based survey design and harm reduction education for the cluster headache patient community. Developed in support of PS27 (Psychedelic Science 2027) presentation and Clusterbusters/ClusterBuds research advocacy.
notes: This software is a harm reduction and research tool. It does not constitute medical advice. DMT is regulated in most jurisdictions. For harm reduction education and survey instrument design only.
